title: Red Hat Security Advisory: transfig security update
overview:
An update for transfig is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder EUS (v.9.6)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: transfig security update

An update for transfig is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for transfig is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
transfig-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.src.rpm
transfig-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.x86_64.rpm
transfig-debuginfo-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.x86_64.rpm
transfig-debugsource-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.x86_64.rpm
transfig-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.ppc64le.rpm
transfig-debuginfo-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.ppc64le.rpm
transfig-debugsource-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.ppc64le.rpm
transfig-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.s390x.rpm
transfig-debuginfo-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.s390x.rpm
transfig-debugsource-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.s390x.rpm
transfig-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.aarch64.rpm
transfig-debuginfo-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.aarch64.rpm
transfig-debugsource-3.2.7b-10.el9_6.1.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-46397: A flaw was found in xfig. This vulnerability allows possible code execution via local input manipulation via bezier_spline function.
